description:
Industry’s most powerful PDF Reader Solution.

View, annotate, form fill, and sign PDF across desktop, mobile, and web – no matter if you’re at the office, home, or on the go.
New Features and Improvements in Foxit PDF Reader 2026.1.0.36452
- New features and enhancements for AI Assistant
  - Provide an Action Inspector feature that analyzes JavaScript actions in documents when users open them, and promptly alerts users to potential risks if detected.
  - Add the Chats tab on the Start page of Foxit PDF Reader to help users easily manage their AI chat history for different documents.
- Add an option to hide the cursor while drawing with the Pencil tool on tablet type devices to enhance the stylus editing experience and resolve pressure sensitivity issues.
- Allow users to enable Overprint Preview for accurate rendering of overprint effects, ensuring correct visual output for print‑production PDFs.
- Support enterprise deployment through Foxit Customization Wizard or Group Policy, allowing administrators to enable the Foxit eSign feature to access the internet even when internet access is disabled for all other features.
- Other enhancements to the user experience.
Issues Addressed in Foxit PDF Reader 2026.1.0.36452
- Fixed some security and stability issues. Click here for details.
